name: twilio-developer-toolkit
description: Two tools for building on Twilio. Skills provide procedural knowledge — which APIs to use, in what order, and what to avoid. Twilio MCP Docs provides real-time hybrid search across Twilio and SendGrid OpenAPI specs, public documentation, and support articles to discover the right APIs, retrieve full parameter schemas, and debug error codes.

interface.shortDescription: Skills + MCP for building, debugging, and shipping on Twilio
interface.longDescription:
Two complementary tools for Twilio developers:

• Skills — Procedural knowledge that guides you to the right Twilio APIs for your use case. Covers channel selection, production best practices, compliance requirements, and common pitfalls across SMS, Voice, WhatsApp, Verify, SendGrid, and 30+ products.

• Twilio MCP Docs — Real-time hybrid search (semantic + lexical) across Twilio and SendGrid OpenAPI specs, public documentation, support articles, and Segment docs. Two tools: twilio__search discovers the right API endpoints and documentation via topic-filtered search (source: "api" for specs, "docs" for knowledge base, "all" for both), and twilio__retrieve returns full parameter schemas and response definitions. Always current — covers new APIs, versions, and error codes as they ship, including APIs released after the model's training cutoff.
defaultPrompt: Help me send an SMS notification with delivery tracking
What Twilio API should I use to verify a user's phone number?
Search Twilio docs for how to add a participant to a Conversation
